item.title: AI & Development: Sharpen your axe before coding
item.description: "Give me six hours to chop down a tree and I will spend the first four sharpening the axe." In the age of AI agents, the time spent thinking, framing and detailing what you actually want has become the real productivity lever.

item.title: Developer and AI: The Willing Suspension of Disbelief
item.description: When a developer starts using AI agents to code, they go through the same stages as a moviegoer: denial, doubt, then that voluntary acceptance that lets you get the most out of it — without ever losing your critical thinking.

item.title: Développeur et IA : La suspension consentie d'incrédulité
item.description: Quand un développeur commence à utiliser des agents IA pour coder, il traverse les mêmes étapes qu'un spectateur au cinéma : le refus, le doute, puis cette acceptation volontaire qui permet d'en tirer le meilleur — sans jamais perdre son esprit critique.

item.title: Développement : De la boîte manuelle au pilote automatique
item.description: Un parallèle entre l'évolution de l'automobile et celle du développement informatique ces 25 dernières années. De la boîte manuelle sans direction assistée à la voiture électrique autonome, du code sans IntelliSense aux agents IA.

item.title: Understanding IOptions<T> in .NET
item.description: Master strongly-typed configuration in .NET with IOptions<T>, IOptionsSnapshot<T>, and IOptionsMonitor<T>. Learn validation, named options, reloadable config, and production best practices.

item.title: Dependency Injection: Lifetimes, Composition Root, Decorators, and Anti-Patterns
item.description: Master Dependency Injection in .NET with comprehensive coverage of lifetimes, composition root patterns, decorators, and common anti-patterns to avoid.

item.title: Pourquoi un cercle est-il divisé en 360 degrés ?
item.description: Découvrez les origines historiques et mathématiques du choix des 360 degrés pour diviser un cercle.

item.title: The Darwin Incident
item.description: Premier épisode de l'anime The Darwin Incident basé sur le manga de Shun Umezawa.

item.title: Prototyping with AI Agents
item.description: Exploring how AI agents like GitHub Copilot can accelerate development - creating multiple C# .NET libraries and samples during holiday break.

item.title: JWT JSON Web Tokens: A Comprehensive Guide
Organizing ASP.NET Configuration with WebApplicationBuilder Extensions
item.description: Learn how to organize your ASP.NET application configuration using extension methods for better maintainability and separation of concerns.

item.title: Good Practices in C# Web APIs: Avoiding Common Pitfalls
item.description: Web APIs drive modern applications, but small mistakes can cause big problems. Learn about 20 common pitfalls in C# Web API development and how to avoid them for better performance, security, and maintainability.

item.title: Mastering Mermaid.js: The Complete Guide to Creating Stunning Diagrams with Code
item.description: Master the art of creating beautiful diagrams with Mermaid.js! From flowcharts to sequence diagrams, learn how to visualize complex concepts using simple text-based syntax that integrates seamlessly into your documentation workflow.

item.title: Bootstrap
item.description: De la botte à l'amorçage, l'étonnante histoire du mot Bootstrap en informatique.

item.title: Mnémoniques
item.description: Découvrez comment les mnémoniques facilitent la mémorisation et comment créer les vôtres.

item.title: The Pitt
item.description: Ce que j'ai aimé dans les 2 premiers épisodes de la série The Pitt.

item.title: Les approximations remarquables du nombre Pi
item.description: Exploration des meilleures approximations fractionnaires du nombre π, de l'antique 22/7 aux fractions continues modernes.

item.title: Building Resilient C# Applications
item.description: Learn how to build resilient C# applications.

item.title: Blazor Server vs Blazor WebAssembly: How to Choose
item.description: Complete guide to choosing between Blazor Server and Blazor WebAssembly for your next project. Compare performance, deployment, and use cases.

item.title: MVP award 2022
item.description: This year, my Microsoft MVP title has been renewed for the 10th time.

item.title: Learn Kana
item.description: Kana (仮名) refer to syllabaries used to write Japanese phonological units.

item.title: Strategy Design Pattern
item.description: Master the Strategy design pattern in C# with practical examples, best practices, and real-world implementations. Learn to create flexible, maintainable algorithms that can be swapped at runtime.

item.title: Factory Design Pattern in C#: Complete Guide with Examples
item.description: Master the Factory design pattern in C# with practical examples, best practices, and real-world implementations. Learn Simple Factory, Factory Method, and Abstract Factory patterns.

item.title: Builder Design Pattern in C#: Constructing Complex Objects Step by Step
item.description: Master the Builder design pattern in C# with fluent interfaces, method chaining, and practical examples. Learn to construct complex objects elegantly and maintainably.

item.title: Je ne sais rien
item.description: Ce que je sais, c'est que je ne sais rien.

item.title: Singleton Design Pattern in C#: Thread-Safe Implementation and Modern Alternatives
item.description: Master the Singleton design pattern in C# with thread-safe implementations, performance considerations, and modern dependency injection alternatives.

item.title: Pangrams - When Every Letter Counts
item.description: Explore the fascinating world of pangrams - sentences that contain every letter of the alphabet, from the classic "quick brown fox" to modern variations.

item.title: The Principles of Software Craftsmanship - Building Excellence in Code
item.description: Explore the fundamental principles of Software Craftsmanship that elevate programming from mere coding to an art form focused on quality, continuous learning, and professional excellence.

item.title: Conférence Orchard Harvest 2013 à Amsterdam Jour 1
Orchard Harvest 2012 Sessions The future of Orchard
Orchard Harvest 2012 Keynote
item.description: Ce week end (8 et 9 Septembre 2012), j'ai eu la chance de participer à la première conférence organisée autour d'Orchard.

item.title: Hello World!
item.description: « Hello, World! » programs are often the first a student learns to write in a given language.
